name: cellxgene-census
tagline: Python skill for querying the public CZ CELLxGENE Census (single-cell/spatial transcriptomics data) via cellxgene-census and TileDB-SOMA.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped skill: only public, unauthenticated scientific data queries, no credential access, no shell-pipe execution, no hidden instructions. Solid failure-path and reproducibility guidance. Minor nit: SKILL.md runs 559 lines, slightly over the ~500-line budget, and it lacks an explicit output-format contract.

highlights.summary: The skill defines how to query/process data but never states an expected output format or deliverable shape for the final answer to the user; low risk since this is a library-usage skill, not a report
File is 559 lines, moderately over the ~500-line soft budget, though much reference detail is already split into separate reference files (lines 445-466).
